ValidationRule.description: ** Deactivate because Italy is live on CCCM and this scope is covered by CCCM validation rules **
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT( $User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), RecordTypeId = '012200000009CuR', NOT(CONTAINS($Label.ALDSATRecordTypeIds,RecordType.DeveloperName)), ISPICKVAL( External_Case_Type__c ,'Complaint'), ISPICKVAL( Status ,'Closed'), OR( ISPICKVAL( Complaint_type__c ,''), ISPICKVAL( Complaint_reason__c,''), ISPICKVAL( Financial_impact__c,''), ISBLANK( Internal_Comments__c), ISPICKVAL( Solution__c,''), ISBLANK( Detail_ActionPlan__c), ISPICKVAL( Commercial_Gesture__c,''), ISBLANK( Commercial_Gesture_Amount__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: please fill in all the fields
